name: ai-cold-mail-generator
description: A web application that generates personalized cold emails using AI with user authentication and OTP verification.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "SERVER,CLIENT" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run server" "npm run client"

author: Saini <ds0752607@gmail.com>
